data.description: ECB says Lagarde remains committed to role, no decision on departure.

data.title: Eric Trump celebrates American Bitcoin hitting 6,000 BTC milestone. Stock down 85% since Nasdaq debut. ABTC holds 6,039 BTC worth $409 million.
data.description: Co-founder Eric Trump of American Bitcoin Corp (NASDAQ: ABTC) celebrated the company's treasury surpassing 6,000 Bitcoins (CRYPTO: BTC) on Tuesday. Trump expressed optimism for the future, citing the achievement as "incredible" within just six months of going public. He emphasized ABTC's rapid growth in public Bitcoin reserves compared to established competitors, stating, "Exciting days ahead!" Currently, American Bitcoin holds 6,039 BTC valued at $409 million, as reported by BitcoinTreasuries.net. This places the company ahead of GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) and Gemini Space Station Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI). Trump's remarks and further details on this milestone are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Oracle glitch causes DeFi lender Moonwell to incur $1.8M in bad debt after liquidators repay just $1 of debt to take cbETH worth.
data.description: A mistake in the repayment process enabled liquidators to reclaim around $1 of debt in exchange for seizing cbETH collateral. This blunder resulted in Moonwell being left with approximately $1.8 million in outstanding debt.

data.title: Pan Global plans 2026 drill programs in Escacena and Cármenes, Spain. Targets include 15 in Escacena and 25 in Cármenes.
data.description: Pan Global Resources Inc. announced that they are initiating a 10,000-meter combined multi-target drill program in Escacena targeting 15 large untested drill sites, and in Cármenes targeting 25 exploration sites. This project showcases district-scale potential for resources. The company is listed on the TSXV as PGZ, OTCQB as PGZFF, and FRA as 2EU. The announcement was made in Vancouver, BC on February 18, 2026.
Jefferies lowers General Mills price target to $42 from $47.
Unilever rating lowered to Hold at Berenberg; price target increased to 5,840p.

data.title: Beneficient (BENF) stock surged 93.46% to $7.39 after-hours on Tuesday with GAAP revenues of $18.67 million and operating income of $3.94 million reported for fiscal Q3 2026.
data.description: Shares of Beneficient (NASDAQ: BENF) skyrocketed by 93.46% to $7.39 in after-hours trading following the release of their fiscal third-quarter 2026 results. The Dallas-based alternative asset liquidity platform reported a significant improvement in key metrics. Their GAAP revenues surged to $18.67 million, a stark increase from the negative $2.76 million in the previous quarter. Furthermore, GAAP operating income rose to $3.94 million, compared to the $17.86 million operating loss in the previous quarter. Net income attributable to common shareholders reached $19.9 million. Basic Class A earnings per share stood at $1.19, while diluted Class A earnings per share were $0.04.

data.title: Ericsson and Mastercard partner to improve digital money movement, providing solutions for telecom providers, fintechs, and banks. Focused on financial inclusion.(Characters: 128)
data.description: Partnership streamlines access to cutting-edge financial transaction services for telecom service providers, fintech companies, and banks. Enhances digital networks in both growing and established markets. Boosts digital financial inclusion for marginalized populations without adequate access to banking services. Announcement made in Stockholm on Feb. 18...

data.title: 2026 Silk Road Spring Festival Gala in Xi'an, China aims to promote cultural exchange globally.
data.description: The 2026 Silk Road Spring Festival Gala in Xi'an, China, on February 18, 2026, is a global event aimed at fostering cultural exchange, organized by the Shaanxi International Communication Center. This Gala, part of the Silk Road cultural exchange brand from Shaanxi, is set to showcase a shared new journey. This event emphasizes unity and collaboration among nations and is an integral part of highlighting cultural diversity. It serves as a platform for global cooperation with significant implications for international relations.

data.title: Arthur Hayes forecasts AI job cuts leading to a credit crisis, prompting central banks to print money, fueling Bitcoin price surge.
data.description: Arthur Hayes is cautioning that the increasing job losses due to artificial intelligence (AI) advancements will lead to a credit crisis. This crisis will compel central banks to print more money to stabilize the economy. Consequently, Bitcoin is expected to surge to unprecedented peaks as a result of this financial situation. Hayes' prediction underscores the concern that the growing reliance on AI may have significant economic implications in the near future. This warning highlights the potential impact of technological developments on traditional financial systems and the growing significance of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin in responding to such challenges. The revelation emphasizes the need for proactive measures in navigating the changing landscape of employment and financial stability.
Berenberg lifts AstraZeneca price target to 17,000p from 16,000p.

data.title: Data breach at TriZetto Provider Solutions exposes 700,000 patient records, investigation ongoing.
data.description: An ongoing investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco looks into a data breach that has affected over 700,000 individuals linked to healthcare providers that worked with TriZetto. The breach resulted in unauthorized access to sensitive information.
South Korea plans no-fly zone near inter-Korean border area.
Euro slips 0.1% following report Lagarde to leave ECB.
South Korea seeks revival of Sept. 19 inter-Korean military agreement.

data.title: Nat Constitution Center & ASU launch online course on American founding, happiness & virtue in partnership.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, the National Constitution Center collaborated with Arizona State University to introduce a new online course titled "What the Founders Meant by Happiness: A Journey Through Virtue and Character." This course, available for free and without credit, aims to explain the concept of happiness as understood by the Founding Fathers.

data.title: India Grids of the Future Accelerator launched with $25 million deployment by 2028, aims to unlock $100 million by 2030.
data.description: A new national initiative has been launched in India to expedite the modernization of the grid and reform power distribution. The initiative is backed by key organizations such as the All India DISCOM Association (AIDA), the International Solar Alliance (ISA), and Champion Utilities. With a projected investment of $25 million by 2028, the initiative aims to unleash a total of $100 million by the year 2030.

Sending drones by civilians damages ties between North and South Korea – Unification Minister.

data.title: Hepsor AS Q4 2025 revenue: 4.5M euros (Q4 2024: 10.5M). Full year revenue: 35.4M euros (2024: 38.4M).
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the Group reported consolidated revenue of 4.5 million euros, a significant decrease from 10.5 million euros in the same quarter of 2024. The total consolidated revenue for the entire reporting year was 35.4 million euros, down from 38.4 million euros in 2024.
